meaning: adj.系统发生的,动植物种类史的
examples: Phylogeny Studies of heterochrony are built upon the phylogenetic assumptions used.
Reconstruction of phylogenetic tree depends upon treemaking method and data set.
Reconstruction of phylogenetic tree of organisms is one of the most important problems in evolution study.
At the heart of both studies is a method based on what are known as phylogenetic studies.
Nearly identical DNA sequences and biochemical pathways are found in different species, across genera, and even across phylogenetic kingdoms.
